channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Some software stocks may be even less desirable in a rebounding market
item.description: Some recent developments suggest the beleaguered software group of stocks may be coming back into favor, as I noted a couple weeks ago following positive responses to both Snowflake and Elastic.
item.dc:creator: Tiernan Ray, Fast Company

item.title: Texting and chat apps aren’t always secure. Use these encrypted platforms instead
item.description: After a sprawling hacking campaign exposed the communications of an unknown number of Americans, U.S. cybersecurity officials are advising people to use encryption in their communications.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Apple rumored to have started production on the iPhone 17 Air
item.description: Moves are now underway to start production on the iPhone 17 Air, which is apparently replacing the iPhone 16 Plus.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Hugging Face Simplifies Generative AI Deployment with HUGS
item.description: Hugging Face introduces HUGS, a service that streamlines generative AI deployment on open-source models, promising optimized performance across various hardware accelerators.
item.dc:creator: udinmwenefosa@gmail.com (Efosa Udinmwen), TechRadar

item.title: Trump hosts Apple CEO at Mar-a-Lago as big tech leaders continue outreach to president-elect
item.description: Donald Trump is hosting Apple CEO Tim Cook for a Friday evening dinner at the president-elect’s Mar-a-Lago resort.
item.dc:creator: Zeke Miller And Aamer Madhani, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Court denies TikTok's request to halt enforcement of potential US ban until Supreme Court review
item.description: A federal appeals court has left in place a mid-January deadline in a federal law requiring TikTok to be sold or face a ban in the United States.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Meta wants Threads to be more like Bluesky. Again
item.description: The surest sign a social media platform is winning: when Meta starts cribbing notes from it. Stories only arrived on Instagram in 2016 after Snapchat proved the ephemeral concept had some heat.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: Warning: This fake PayPal email scam is everywhere right now
item.description: Fraudsters are sending people bogus invoices through PayPal as part of a sneaky scam that is going around; here's how to protect yourself from being fooled.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sophia, a famous robot and global icon of AI, wins hearts at Zimbabwe's innovation fair
item.description: HARARE, Zimbabwe (AP) — From answering questions from Cabinet ministers, academics and students on climate change, substance abuse and the law to children’s inquiries about her “birth” and links to God and being described as a talkative feminist, Sophia, the world-famous robot won hearts at an innov
item.dc:creator: BY FARAI MUTSAKA, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: OpenAI's Altman will donate $1 million to Trump's inaugural fund
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman is planning to make a $1 million personal donation to President-Elect Donald Trump’s inauguration fund, joining a number of tech companies and executives who are working to improve their relationships the incoming administration.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Parvini, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Feds propose protection for giant salamanders devastated by Hurricane Helene
item.description: A giant salamander that evolved on the supercontinent Pangaea and outlived the dinosaurs has been proposed for federal protection by the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service.
item.dc:creator: Brittany Peterson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Process Intelligence: The CIO’s secret weapon for unlocking value
item.description: CIOs are under intense pressure to deliver massive digital transformation initiatives with limited resources under tight time constraints. Boards of directors are placing a high priority on deploying generative AI as fast as possible so their organizations don’t lose competitive advantage.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Metaphor: ReFantazio, Dragon Age, Astro Bot and an indie wave lead the top AP video games of 2024
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — It’s been a rough year in the world of video games, which reeled from some high-profile flops (sorry, Suicide Squad and Star Wars fans) and a relentless series of developer layoffs. Fortunately, indie designers stepped up to fill in the gaps.
item.dc:creator: LOU KESTEN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Musk knocks SEC over settlement offer in probe
item.description: Tech mogul Elon Musk criticized the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on Thursday over a settlement offer in the agency’s probe into his 2022 purchase of Twitter, the social platform now known as X.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: US updates a science and technology pact with China to reflect growing rivalry and security threats
item.description: The U.S. has updated a decades-old science and technology agreement with China to reflect their growing rivalry for technological dominance.
item.dc:creator: Didi Tang, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: What is data science? Transforming data into value
item.description: What is data science? Data science is a method to glean insights from structured and unstructured data using approaches ranging from statistical analysis to machine learning (ML).
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Chicago flunks cloud economics
item.description: The city of Chicago has devised a brilliant plan to jack up its cloud computing tax from 9% to 11%. As someone who has worked in tech for decades, I’ve seen this movie before, and (spoiler alert) it didn’t have a happy ending. This is not a diatribe against taxes; taxes are not the issue here.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump backs dockworkers' union preparing to strike over automation
item.description: President-elect Trump backed the dockworkers' union as it prepares for a strike over automation in mid-January — right before the former president is set to return to the Oval Office.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, The Hill

item.title: Gig workers behind AI training firm sue for better conditions
item.description: A new class action lawsuit alleges poor working conditions and exploitive behavior by AI data processing company Scale AI, saying that workers responsible for generating much of its product were mischaracterized by the company as independent contractors, rather than full employees.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: DoorDash steps up driver ID checks after traffic safety complaints
item.description: DoorDash will require its drivers to verify their identities more often as part of a larger effort to crack down on unauthorized account sharing. DoorDash has been under pressure to ensure its drivers are operating legally.
item.dc:creator: DEE-ANN DURBIN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: AMD data center chips vulnerable to revealing data through ‘BadRAM’ attack
item.description: AMD’s Secure Encrypted Virtualization (SEV), meant to protect processor memory from prying eyes in virtual machine (VM) environments, can be tricked into giving access to its encrypted memory contents using a test rig costing less than $10, researchers have revealed.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: By 2028, 30% of Fortune 500 companies could use AI-only service channels
item.description: As businesses race toward digital transformation, Gartner has forecasted a game-changing shift in customer service strategies for Fortune 500 companies.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 7 must-have apps to save big this holiday season
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson presents seven options this holiday season to help shoppers save time and money, from cash-back apps to discount tools.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to catch the Geminids, one of the strongest meteor showers of the year
item.description: The Geminids are among the few major meteor showers to come from asteroids, and this year they will peak on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Christina Larson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Defense Commissary Agency striving to balance cyber, CX
item.description: Michelyne LeBlanc, the deputy CIO of the Defense Commissary Agency, said the move to zero trust is all about ensuring customer confidence in its services. The post Defense Commissary Agency striving to balance cyber, CX first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network
